urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Blasts reported in Iran as US launches new wave of strikes
latest.summary: The US military has conducted strikes against Iran for six consecutive nights. These attacks aim to degrade Iranian military capabilities and have targeted locations near the Strait of Hormuz.
latest.details: The US military has conducted strikes against Iran for six consecutive nights. These attacks aim to degrade Iranian military capabilities and have targeted locations near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's state media reported that US missiles struck near the island of Qeshm and in Bandar Abbas and Bushehr. The US Central Command also stated that marines boarded an oil tanker as part of a blockade of Iranian ports.
latest.full_brief: The US military has conducted strikes against Iran for six consecutive nights. These attacks aim to degrade Iranian military capabilities and have targeted locations near the Strait of Hormuz. Iran's state media reported that US missiles struck near the island of Qeshm and in Bandar Abbas and Bushehr. The US Central Command also stated that marines boarded an oil tanker as part of a blockade of Iranian ports.

latest.title: Air quality plummets in 20 US states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads
latest.summary: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis.
latest.details: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.
latest.full_brief: Air quality alerts have been issued in over 20 US states due to smoke from Canadian wildfires. The smoke has made Chicago's air quality the worst in the world, followed by Detroit and Minneapolis. Local officials in New York City have urged residents to limit outdoor activities, especially vulnerable populations. NASA reported that winds have carried smoke primarily southeast, affecting large areas of the US.

latest.title: One man's hunger strike changed India's map. Can it still change politics?
latest.summary: Potti Sriramulu's hunger strike in 1952 lasted 58 days and aimed to create a separate state for Telugu speakers. His death led to widespread protests and unrest, prompting Prime Minister Jawaharlal Nehru to announce the creation of Andhra state.
latest.details: Potti Sriramulu's hunger strike in 1952 lasted 58 days and aimed to create a separate state for Telugu speakers. His death led to widespread protests and unrest, prompting Prime Minister Jawaharlal Nehru to announce the creation of Andhra state. This event significantly influenced India's political landscape and the subsequent linguistic reorganization of states. Historian Ramachandra Guha noted that Sriramulu's impact on India's history and geography is often overlooked.
latest.full_brief: Potti Sriramulu's hunger strike in 1952 lasted 58 days and aimed to create a separate state for Telugu speakers. His death led to widespread protests and unrest, prompting Prime Minister Jawaharlal Nehru to announce the creation of Andhra state. This event significantly influenced India's political landscape and the subsequent linguistic reorganization of states. Historian Ramachandra Guha noted that Sriramulu's impact on India's history and geography is often overlooked.

latest.title: Watch: What to know as Genoa bridge disaster trial ends
latest.summary: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people.
latest.details: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people. Another official received an 11-year sentence as part of the trial involving 32 individuals found guilty. The disaster occurred during a rainstorm at a peak holiday time, leading to significant public outcry.
latest.full_brief: The former CEO of Italy's motorway operator has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster. The collapse of the Morandi bridge in August 2018 resulted in the deaths of 43 people. Another official received an 11-year sentence as part of the trial involving 32 individuals found guilty. The disaster occurred during a rainstorm at a peak holiday time, leading to significant public outcry.

latest.title: Fifa 'assessing match reports' over Falklands banner
latest.summary: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England.
latest.details: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England. In 2014, Argentina was fined for a similar incident, which Fifa deemed a breach of political action rules. The UK government has expressed its commitment to the Falkland Islands, emphasizing their status as a British overseas territory.
latest.full_brief: Fifa is currently reviewing match reports regarding Argentina's players displaying a banner supporting their claim to the Falkland Islands. The banner was shown after Argentina's World Cup semi-final victory over England. In 2014, Argentina was fined for a similar incident, which Fifa deemed a breach of political action rules. The UK government has expressed its commitment to the Falkland Islands, emphasizing their status as a British overseas territory.

latest.title: UK heatwave approaches two-week mark
latest.summary: The UK is experiencing a heatwave that has lasted nearly two weeks in some areas. Southern England has recorded 13 consecutive days above heatwave criteria, with temperatures reaching 30.6C in Merryfield, Somerset.
latest.details: The UK is experiencing a heatwave that has lasted nearly two weeks in some areas. Southern England has recorded 13 consecutive days above heatwave criteria, with temperatures reaching 30.6C in Merryfield, Somerset. This year's heatwave has been attributed to climate change and a specific weather pattern that has allowed high pressure to build. Comparisons are being made to the historic heatwave of 1976, although this year has seen higher extreme temperatures.
latest.full_brief: The UK is experiencing a heatwave that has lasted nearly two weeks in some areas. Southern England has recorded 13 consecutive days above heatwave criteria, with temperatures reaching 30.6C in Merryfield, Somerset. This year's heatwave has been attributed to climate change and a specific weather pattern that has allowed high pressure to build. Comparisons are being made to the historic heatwave of 1976, although this year has seen higher extreme temperatures.

latest.title: NASA Welcomes Serbia as Newest Artemis Accords Signatory
latest.summary: Serbia signed the Artemis Accords, becoming the 69th nation to join the initiative for peaceful space exploration. The signing ceremony took place at NASA Headquarters, with Serbia's Minister of Foreign Affairs representing the country.
latest.details: Serbia signed the Artemis Accords, becoming the 69th nation to join the initiative for peaceful space exploration. The signing ceremony took place at NASA Headquarters, with Serbia's Minister of Foreign Affairs representing the country. NASA Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson highlighted Serbia's historical contributions to space exploration, particularly during the Apollo program. The Artemis Accords aim to foster international collaboration in lunar exploration and technology.
latest.full_brief: Serbia signed the Artemis Accords, becoming the 69th nation to join the initiative for peaceful space exploration. The signing ceremony took place at NASA Headquarters, with Serbia's Minister of Foreign Affairs representing the country. NASA Deputy Administrator Matt Anderson highlighted Serbia's historical contributions to space exploration, particularly during the Apollo program. The Artemis Accords aim to foster international collaboration in lunar exploration and technology.

latest.title: Fortnite is getting a bunch of AI-powered ‘personas’
latest.summary: Epic Games is introducing AI-powered characters in Fortnite, allowing creators to use 36 new personas starting July 30th. These characters will feature consistent voices and are based on performances captured from professional actors.
latest.details: Epic Games is introducing AI-powered characters in Fortnite, allowing creators to use 36 new personas starting July 30th. These characters will feature consistent voices and are based on performances captured from professional actors. The company previously tested AI characters with Darth Vader, whose voice was provided by James Earl Jones. Epic plans to explore opportunities to use original voices from well-known actors in the Fortnite ecosystem.
latest.full_brief: Epic Games is introducing AI-powered characters in Fortnite, allowing creators to use 36 new personas starting July 30th. These characters will feature consistent voices and are based on performances captured from professional actors. The company previously tested AI characters with Darth Vader, whose voice was provided by James Earl Jones. Epic plans to explore opportunities to use original voices from well-known actors in the Fortnite ecosystem.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.
